name: Tyria
title: Apostle
description: A picky girl from Monastir. She usually maintains a haughty and elegant tone of speech, but when she gets angry, rough and harsh words sometimes slip out.

skills.name: Prelude to the End
skills.description: Tyria charges towards the enemy with her greatsword. Grants self 1 stack of Ignition.

skills.name: Requiem of Ruin
skills.description: Binds the enemy with thorny vines and swings a greatsword with grace. Deals 10% additional damage on attack for each stack of Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) on the enemy, and deals an additional 50% damage if the enemy is Defender-class. Removes Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) from the enemy after attacking. Deals 20% increased damage if Ignition is at max stacks on attack. Removes all stacks of Ignition after attacking. Grants self SPD Up for 3 turns if this skill is not an additionally triggered skill.

skills.name: Crescendo of Sorrow
skills.description: Slashes through space with a greatsword, dealing massive damage to all enemies. Grants self Shatter for 2 turns, and grants self 2 stacks of Ignition. Inflicts all enemies 1 stack of Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) with a 100% chance, and inflicts the enemy with the highest DEF 3 stacks of Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable).

novaBurst.uniqueDesc: Temporarily deals 1 more Toughness Fixed DMG on attack. Grants self an extra turn after attacking.

skills.name: Guillotine Executor
skills.description: Penetrates 15% of DEF if the enemy has Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) when using Prelude to the End or Requiem of Ruin. Inflicts the enemy with Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) with a 100% chance after using Prelude to the End. Triggers Requiem of Ruin if the enemy's Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) is at max stacks after using Prelude to the End.

Triggers Requiem of Ruin if the enemy's Thorns of Ruin (Undispellable) is at max stacks after using Prelude to the End.
